scripts.test:integration: npm run wp-env:start && npm run wp-env:setup && wp-env run tests-cli php wp-content/plugins/AdminConfig/vendor/bin/phpunit --configuration wp-content/plugins/AdminConfig/phpunit.integration.xml.dist
scripts.test:e2e: npm run wp-env:start && npm run wp-env:setup && playwright test
scripts.test:wp: npm run test:integration && npm run test:e2e
